$comment: Design token file for the Carousel component
$description: Full-featured image/content carousel. A fixed-size viewport (361×400px in Figma reference frames) that overlays navigation arrows and a position indicator on top of a content slot. All sub-components — Empty Container (content placeholder), Dot Indicator, Dot Group, Number Indicator, and Arrow — are from the same Figma file and have their own token files. This file captures only the container dimensions and the 45-variant combination matrix. Layout behaviour: the content slot fills the entire viewport; arrows and the indicator group are absolutely positioned within the carousel bounds at positions defined by the variant (Centre, Top Left, Top Right, Bottom Left, Bottom Right).

$component.name: Carousel
subComponents: Carousel Empty Container (same file — mobile-components, node 742:27043)
Carousel Dot Indicator (same file — mobile-components, node 737:11231)
Carousel Dot Group (same file — mobile-components, node 737:11306)
Carousel Number Indicator (same file — mobile-components, node 755:5947)

overlay-padding.description: Inset from the carousel edge at which arrows and the indicator group are placed when in a corner/edge position variant - 12px

gap.description: Gap between the carousel and the arrows and indicator group - 8px (xs - 8px)

background-color.description: Background color of the carousel - neutral/base - #ffffff
